stop_reason: All acceptance criteria met. Verification script passes, startup launch controller module with full unit tests is in place, Electron main-process tray integration exists, acceptance report written, and no forbidden features detected.
summary: Phase 2 Deferred Slice 5 is complete and correct. The startup launch setting controller (`src/shared/startupLaunch.ts`) implements the `StartupLaunchAdapter`/`StartupLaunchController` pattern with injected adapter, the test file (`src/shared/startupLaunch.test.ts`) covers read/get, set, toggle, redundant-write avoidance, current-state reads, and adapter error propagation. `src/main.ts` wires it into the tray context menu via `app.getLoginItemSettings()`/`app.setLoginItemSettings()`. All 111 tests pass, typecheck is clean, production build succeeds for all three entry points.
evidence: src/shared/startupLaunch.ts exists with StartupLaunchAdapter and StartupLaunchController interfaces
src/shared/startupLaunch.test.ts has 6 tests: read state, enable/disable, toggle, redundant write avoidance, current state reads, adapter error propagation
src/main.ts integrates createStartupLaunchController with Electron adapter via tray 'Launch at Login' checkbox
npm run build: succeeds for renderer, main, preload
No forbidden paths exist (hotkeys.ts, pluginActions.ts, backend.ts, notifications.ts)
No forbidden UI patterns detected in src/App.tsx
manual_verification_required: Launch-at-login can be enabled from the tray/menu setting
Launch-at-login can be disabled from the tray/menu setting
No hotkey, notification, backend, upload, sound, plugin, file upload, or import/export behavior is present
next_maker_instruction: Phase 2 is complete. Do not implement Phase 3 until explicitly authorized in a new phase prompt.
